mapper.select: SELECT alba_id AS albaId, image_id AS imageId, store_id AS storeId, alba_name AS albaName, alba_phone AS albaPhone, alba_email AS albaEmail, alba_status AS albaStatus FROM alba WHERE alba_id = #{albaId}

SELECT alba_id AS albaId, image_id AS imageId, store_id AS storeId, alba_name AS albaName, alba_phone AS albaPhone, alba_email AS albaEmail, alba_status AS albaStatus FROM alba WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO alba (store_id, alba_name, alba_phone, alba_email, alba_status, created_at, updated_at, is_active, image_id) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{albaName}, #{albaPhone}, #{albaEmail}, #{albaStatus}, NOW(), NOW(), b'1', #{imageId})
mapper.update: UPDATE alba SET is_active = 0, updated_at = NOW() WHERE alba_id = #{albaId}
mapper.select: SELECT a.alba_name FROM alba a WHERE a.alba_id = #{albaId} AND is_active = b'1'
